title: **Keycloak instance**: OIDC-compliant; ACMP registered as a client; group/realm-role claims carrying ACMP role names; test credentials for claim-mapping spike.
statement: **Keycloak instance**: OIDC-compliant; ACMP registered as a client; group/realm-role claims carrying ACMP role names; test credentials for claim-mapping spike.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-001", "Dependency": "**Keycloak instance**: OIDC-compliant; ACMP registered as a client; group/realm-role claims carrying ACMP role names; test credentials for claim-mapping spike.", "Type": "External / Identity", "Criticality": "Blocking", "Notes": "Provider: Org IT / Identity team. Required by: PH-0 spike; PH-1 build start. Risk if unavailable: Identity integration blocked; ACMP cannot authenticate users. Mitigation: PH-0 spike; static role config fallback for dev; escalate as blocking if not resolved before PH-1 code start."}}

title: **SQL Server instance**: Dedicated instance (or named database on a shared instance with exclusive schema) allocated to ACMP; connection string accessible from Docker Compose.
statement: **SQL Server instance**: Dedicated instance (or named database on a shared instance with exclusive schema) allocated to ACMP; connection string accessible from Docker Compose.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-002", "Dependency": "**SQL Server instance**: Dedicated instance (or named database on a shared instance with exclusive schema) allocated to ACMP; connection string accessible from Docker Compose.", "Type": "External / Infrastructure", "Criticality": "Blocking", "Notes": "Provider: Org DBA / IT. Required by: PH-0. Risk if unavailable: Database layer cannot be built or tested. Mitigation: Docker Compose includes a SQL Server container for dev; prod instance is an org allocation. Dev is never blocked."}}

title: **MinIO provisioning**: S3-compatible endpoint (self-hosted MinIO container in Compose stack); storage volume mounted from host with adequate capacity.
statement: **MinIO provisioning**: S3-compatible endpoint (self-hosted MinIO container in Compose stack); storage volume mounted from host with adequate capacity.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-003", "Dependency": "**MinIO provisioning**: S3-compatible endpoint (self-hosted MinIO container in Compose stack); storage volume mounted from host with adequate capacity.", "Type": "Internal / Infrastructure", "Criticality": "Important", "Notes": "Provider: Team (Docker Compose). Required by: PH-1 (file attachments). Risk if unavailable: File attachments, diagram artifacts, and recording uploads cannot be stored. Mitigation: MinIO is included in the Compose stack as an ACMP-owned container; no external provisioning needed unless prod volume is constrained."}}

title: **Development VM and Docker Compose environment**: A VM accessible to the team with Docker Engine installed; able to pull or cache required base images.
statement: **Development VM and Docker Compose environment**: A VM accessible to the team with Docker Engine installed; able to pull or cache required base images.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-004", "Dependency": "**Development VM and Docker Compose environment**: A VM accessible to the team with Docker Engine installed; able to pull or cache required base images.", "Type": "Internal / Infrastructure", "Criticality": "Blocking", "Notes": "Provider: Org IT. Required by: PH-0. Risk if unavailable: No development or CI environment. Mitigation: Coordinate VM provisioning in PH-0; document image registry requirements for air-gapped setup (RISK-009)."}}

title: **Self-hosted Seq container**: Seq is included in the ACMP Docker Compose stack; no external Seq license required for development (Seq has a free single-user license; production may require commercial
statement: **Self-hosted Seq container**: Seq is included in the ACMP Docker Compose stack; no external Seq license required for development (Seq has a free single-user license; production may require commercial license for team logging).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-005", "Dependency": "**Self-hosted Seq container**: Seq is included in the ACMP Docker Compose stack; no external Seq license required for development (Seq has a free single-user license; production may require commercial license for team logging).", "Type": "Internal (Compose stack)", "Criticality": "Optional", "Notes": "Provider: Team. Required by: PH-1. Risk if unavailable: Observability (log search) unavailable; structured logs go to stdout only. Mitigation: Seq is bundled in Compose; stdout fallback always available. Verify licensing at scale."}}

title: **Tarseem v1.0 render sidecar**: Python ≥3.10 + pip + Chromium + Node/elkjs inside a container; `tarseem doctor` passes; internal HTTP endpoint (FastAPI wrapper) callable from Hangfire job.
statement: **Tarseem v1.0 render sidecar**: Python ≥3.10 + pip + Chromium + Node/elkjs inside a container; `tarseem doctor` passes; internal HTTP endpoint (FastAPI wrapper) callable from Hangfire job.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-006", "Dependency": "**Tarseem v1.0 render sidecar**: Python ≥3.10 + pip + Chromium + Node/elkjs inside a container; `tarseem doctor` passes; internal HTTP endpoint (FastAPI wrapper) callable from Hangfire job.", "Type": "External / Integration (Tarseem repo)", "Criticality": "Important", "Notes": "Provider: Team (containerize from `github.com/A-H-911/tarseem`). Required by: PH-2. Risk if unavailable: Diagram rendering unavailable; dependency graph visualization unavailable. ADRs and topics can still reference JSON specs, but render artifacts are not generated. Mitigation: JSON spec stored as source of truth (ADR-0006); rendering is asynchronous; missing render is non-blocking. PH-0 spike validates container build."}}

title: **Webex bot/integration account + Webex licensing**: OAuth2 integration account registered; scopes for meetings/recordings/transcripts/messaging granted; Webex Adaptive Cards enabled on the org's Webe
statement: **Webex bot/integration account + Webex licensing**: OAuth2 integration account registered; scopes for meetings/recordings/transcripts/messaging granted; Webex Adaptive Cards enabled on the org's Webex deployment; Webex Assistant enabled for transcripts (Control Hub admin decision).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-007", "Dependency": "**Webex bot/integration account + Webex licensing**: OAuth2 integration account registered; scopes for meetings/recordings/transcripts/messaging granted; Webex Adaptive Cards enabled on the org's Webex deployment; Webex Assistant enabled for transcripts (Control Hub admin decision).", "Type": "External / Integration (Webex SaaS)", "Criticality": "Important", "Notes": "Provider: Org IT / Webex admin. Required by: PH-2. Risk if unavailable: Webex Adaptive Card notifications unavailable; recording/transcript retrieval unavailable. In-app notifications continue to work. Mitigation: Webex is Phase 2; initiate procurement/admin conversation in PH-1. Adapter abstraction means in-app notifications are never blocked by Webex availability."}}

title: **Keystone package schema stability**: Keystone v1.0 manifest schema and artifact types must be stable for the import tool (BL-116) to parse reliably.
statement: **Keystone package schema stability**: Keystone v1.0 manifest schema and artifact types must be stable for the import tool (BL-116) to parse reliably.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-008", "Dependency": "**Keystone package schema stability**: Keystone v1.0 manifest schema and artifact types must be stable for the import tool (BL-116) to parse reliably.", "Type": "External / Optional (Keystone repo `github.com/A-H-911/keystone`)", "Criticality": "Optional", "Notes": "Provider: Keystone project. Required by: future (Keystone import — deferred out of P15, D-05, 2026-07-12). Risk if unavailable: Keystone import tool cannot be built without a stable schema. Research Missions still work standalone. Mitigation: Keystone is optional (CON-013, ADR-0007). Import tool pins to a specific Keystone release. Research module is never blocked."}}

title: **SMTP relay**: An org SMTP relay or approved cloud mail service (with data-processing agreement if cloud) available to the ACMP container network.
statement: **SMTP relay**: An org SMTP relay or approved cloud mail service (with data-processing agreement if cloud) available to the ACMP container network.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-009", "Dependency": "**SMTP relay**: An org SMTP relay or approved cloud mail service (with data-processing agreement if cloud) available to the ACMP container network.", "Type": "External / Infrastructure", "Criticality": "Optional", "Notes": "Provider: Org IT. Required by: PH-3 (email adapter). Risk if unavailable: Email notifications unavailable. In-app and Webex notifications continue. Mitigation: Email is Phase 3; INotificationChannel abstraction means email is purely additive. SMTP relay availability does not block any earlier phase."}}

title: **LLM endpoint for AI extraction (Phase 3)**: An on-prem or org-approved cloud LLM endpoint reachable from ACMP container; data-residency review completed; endpoint supports transcript chunk inputs.
statement: **LLM endpoint for AI extraction (Phase 3)**: An on-prem or org-approved cloud LLM endpoint reachable from ACMP container; data-residency review completed; endpoint supports transcript chunk inputs.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-010", "Dependency": "**LLM endpoint for AI extraction (Phase 3)**: An on-prem or org-approved cloud LLM endpoint reachable from ACMP container; data-residency review completed; endpoint supports transcript chunk inputs.", "Type": "External / AI", "Criticality": "Optional", "Notes": "Provider: Org IT / AI team. Required by: PH-3 (AI extraction). Risk if unavailable: AI candidate extraction unavailable. Manual transcript review always available as fallback. Mitigation: AI extraction is Phase 3, off by default, and gated by Admin activation + privacy confirmation (RISK-012, CON-015)."}}

title: **CI/CD system** (GH Actions self-hosted runner / GitLab CI / Azure DevOps — OQ-CI): A CI pipeline that can build Docker images, run tests, and optionally push to a private registry from the developme
statement: **CI/CD system** (GH Actions self-hosted runner / GitLab CI / Azure DevOps — OQ-CI): A CI pipeline that can build Docker images, run tests, and optionally push to a private registry from the development VM.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "DEP-011", "Dependency": "**CI/CD system** (GH Actions self-hosted runner / GitLab CI / Azure DevOps — OQ-CI): A CI pipeline that can build Docker images, run tests, and optionally push to a private registry from the development VM.", "Type": "Internal / Infrastructure", "Criticality": "Important", "Notes": "Provider: Org DevSecOps / Team. Required by: PH-0 (skeleton); PH-1 (full). Risk if unavailable: No automated test gate; manual deployment only. Mitigation: OQ-CI resolution required in PH-0.
